issues.description: Trigger 'Trigger' is vague and incorrect. Should be 'OnPlay' since this is a Main card effect that activates when played.

SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing: (1) filter specification for {Blackbeard Pirates} type AND exclusion of [My Era...Begins!!], (2) limit of 'up to 1' card, (3) reveal requirement, (4) trash remainder action.
Missing second action: ForceDiscard (trash) for remaining cards after SearchDeck completes.
Filter 'Any' is incorrect. Must specify type filter '{Blackbeard Pirates}' and exclude card name '[My Era...Begins!!]'.
